{{Infobox character
| name = Chronicler (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = The Chronicler
| abilities = Reader
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Chronicler (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Chronicler is a title held by members of a specific [[Guild]] responsible for witnessing, recording, and disseminating [[Imperial]] history. [[Naberius Clayborn]] is an individual who held this position, previously serving as the keeper of the [[Imperial Palace treasury]]. Following the death of [[the Emperor]], [[Naberius]] and a partner utilized their exclusive knowledge of the treasury to fund essential operations such as the [[Imperial Guard]] and the maintenance of the Capital. [[Naberius]] aims to use his resources and a specific treasure to install a new Emperor to prevent the [[Empire]] from collapsing. The role involves traveling the [[Aion]] and may include working alongside a [[Silent One]], who serves as a bodyguard and guide while remaining mute to protect secrets. Additionally, the Chronicler's duties involve studying historical records and interacting with various entities to preserve knowledge.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]], known as The Chronicler, is a highly skilled Reader and a former member of his order capable of writing notes with great speed. While traveling as a passenger on a ship, he became aware of a secret treasure belonging to [[the Emperor]] that had never been shared with anyone else. During his journey, he managed to grasp the [[Heart of Nakothi]], though he later wailed in grief after losing the artifact. While present at the table, it was suggested that he might possess control over [[Bliss]] and could even deserve the throne if faced with a sentence of death and insanity.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler is a Reader of impressive skill.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler knows of a treasure owned by [[the Emperor]] that was never entrusted to another.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler is a character on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler staggered to his feet clutching the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler wailed after losing the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler is present at the table.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler is a person who may have control over [[Bliss]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Chronicler might deserve the throne if it is a sentence of insanity and death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A Chronicler is someone capable of writing notes quickly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is known as The Chronicler.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] is a former Chronicler.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Chroniclers]] carry a belt of wax candles at their waist.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Chroniclers]] are present in the room.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
